Interface IPansharpeningFunctionArguments2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control pansharpening function arguments.

[Guid("CF0A1F4E-5A42-4DFB-A80F-92B6C3369E37")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPansharpeningFunctionArguments2 : IPansharpeningFunctionArguments

Properties

InfraredImage 

object InfraredImage { get; set; }

Property Value

object

KeepStatsHistogram

Indicates if the input MS image's statistics and histogram should be kept.

bool KeepStatsHistogram { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MSImage 

object MSImage { get; set; }

Property Value

object

MaximumPansharpeningCellsize

The maximum cellsize, in Pan image's SR, below which pansharpening will be applied.

double MaximumPansharpeningCellsize { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PanImage 

object PanImage { get; set; }

Property Value

object

PansharpeningType 

esriPansharpeningType PansharpeningType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriPansharpeningType

Weights 

IDoubleArray Weights { get; set; }

Property Value
